hospitals.name: Victoria Hospital
hospitals.note: Major government tertiary hospital with a dedicated casualty/trauma department (Mahabodhi Burns and Casualty block).

hospitals.name: NIMHANS
hospitals.note: India's premier neuro/psychiatric institute; not a general trauma center.

hospitals.name: Bowring & Lady Curzon Hospital
hospitals.note: Government multi-specialty hospital in central Bengaluru (Shivaji Nagar).

hospitals.name: St. John's Medical College Hospital
hospitals.note: 1200-bed teaching hospital; ICU figure combines adult (35) + coronary (7) + paediatric (13) + neonatal (35) critical care units per hospital's published data.

hospitals.name: Manipal Hospital Old Airport Road
hospitals.note: Toll-free number is Manipal Hospitals' group-wide appointment/emergency line.

hospitals.name: Fortis Hospital Bannerghatta Rd
hospitals.note: Emergency line per Fortis Healthcare's published hospital contact listing.

hospitals.name: Apollo Hospital Bannerghatta Rd
hospitals.note: Main hospital line; ask specifically for Emergency on connecting.

hospitals.name: Narayana Health City
hospitals.note: Official emergency helpline per narayanahealth.org. Large multi-institution campus (cardiac, cancer, eye, multispecialty).

hospitals.name: Sakra World Hospital
hospitals.note: Main hospital contact number; confirm emergency routing when calling.

hospitals.name: Manipal Hospital Hebbal (formerly Columbia Asia)
hospitals.note: Columbia Asia's Indian hospitals were acquired by Manipal Hospitals; this facility now operates under the Manipal brand at the same Kirloskar Business Park location.

hospitals.name: Vydehi Institute of Medical Sciences
hospitals.note: Large teaching hospital in East Bengaluru (Whitefield).

hospitals.name: Aster CMI Hospital
hospitals.note: Quaternary care hospital in North Bengaluru (Hebbal/Sahakar Nagar).

hospitals.name: Rajarajeswari Medical College Hospital
hospitals.note: Teaching hospital in West Bengaluru (Kengeri, Mysore Road) -- this location was significantly corrected from an earlier estimate that placed it ~6km away.

hospitals.name: M S Ramaiah Memorial Hospital
hospitals.note: Large teaching hospital, North Bengaluru (New BEL Road).

hospitals.name: Jayadeva Institute of Cardiology
hospitals.note: Government cardiac-specialty institute; the right destination specifically for cardiac emergencies, not general trauma.

hospitals.name: KIMS Hospital & Research Centre
hospitals.note: Located in Basavanagudi -- this replaces an earlier, unverifiable 'KIMS Hospital Hebbal' entry that did not match any real facility.
